ground_truth.title: Gallup - Workplace Consulting & Global Research
ground_truth.main_content: Gallup is more than management consulting. Learn how our understanding of the human experience helps clients and the billions they serve thrive. Featured content includes: AI Use at Work Rises with new data showing continued rise in AI adoption rates across the U.S. workforce from Q2 to Q3 2025; Tracking the World's Emotional Health showing negative emotions remain far above levels from a decade ago; Trump's Approval Rating Drops to 36%, a new second-term low; How to Inspire Creativity With Diane Hoskins; More Americans Say Political Rhetoric Has Gone Too Far with larger majorities than in 2011; Cost Leads Americans' Top-of-Mind Healthcare Concerns; U.S. Mental Health Ratings Continue to Worsen; Growing Worry Over Medicare, Social Security; Independents Drive Approval of ACA to New High of 57%; Economic Confidence Slips; Holiday Spending Plans Plummet; Most Lebanese Say Only Army Should Have Weapons. Global Indicators measuring progress on what matters most to workplaces and societies. West Health-Gallup Center on Healthcare delivers rigorous research on America's healthcare system. State rankings expose cracks in America's healthcare system. More reports available including State of the Global Workplace Report, State of the World's Emotional Health, World Happiness Report, Global Leadership Report, Global Safety Report, Rating World Leaders Report, The State of Higher Education 2025, and Teaching for Tomorrow.
with: New Gallup data show a continued rise in AI adoption rates across the U.S. workforce from Q2 to Q3 2025.
Gallup's new report on emotional health shows negative emotions remain far above levels from a decade ago.
President Donald Trump's job approval rating has slipped to a new second-term low point.
The West Health-Gallup Center on Healthcare delivers rigorous research and data-driven insights.
We provide data no one else has, to help you make decisions no one else can.
without: Copyright © 2025 Gallup, Inc. All rights reserved.
